title: 5 things every AI agent harness needs
summary: Muhammad Farooq from Google Cloud presents five critical components required in an AI agent harness beyond the model itself. He argues that the harness is what translates model predictions into functional deployed agents, distinguishing production-ready systems from demonstrations.
writeup: Muhammad Farooq from Google Cloud lays out five components an AI agent harness needs beyond the underlying model. The central argument: the harness is what converts model predictions into functional deployed agents, and it separates production-ready systems from demonstrations. Concepts touched include multi-agent systems and edge deployment.
